## Excerpt (first 6 000 chars, docx)

Rubiem Innovations  
275 Herbert Chitepo Avenue  
Harare, Zimbabwe  
Tel: \+263 717 770 666 | \+263 782 664 402 | \+263 773 840 189  
Email: admin@rubiem\.com  


Date: 30 December 2025  
  
Attention:  
Group Head – Procurement Management Unit  
\[AFC Holdingse\]  
\[[__Hurudza House, 14\-16 Nelson Mandela Avenue, Harare, Zimbabwe__](https://www.google.com/search?q=Hurudza+House%2C+14-16+Nelson+Mandela+Avenue%2C+Harare%2C+Zimbabwe&sca_esv=8b2ea0a48f02c09a&sxsrf=AE3TifNbX9M27AhGgqxA7wvcvud3yc3Rrg%3A1767164156783&ei=_MhUafHIL_61hbIP1_ixwAE&oq=afc+holdings+adre&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfB89t5zUF0-Piipni6S5z1wQjp3oSvM3-nK5UOEcVf1NckiyfGOOVmuhbWGjIZE_gLeYrzFDDCjVqEpUyZjmiztpK2glSFBvn0iDS8a9Onz4Oy684AImEWEeD_eDnwCAa_tcMABcQXed5mWUy0BbUH1Xny5E_ZjbJOQgmjeb2WF5McY8St-XE_-XDArRG8AGJ9jvhuhlPlsXjpU0LLmFh0CRrD1EtjgGfRQosEK7LUP8G6j4cReJkolgY4d_SRxpVcwZBGvzuG3Exf9ACIJun1z&csui=3&ved=2ahUKEwiR687Cn-eRAxVSX0EAHWJMIdAQgK4QegQIARAE)__, __\]  
  
Dear Sir,  
  
RE: TENDER RESPONSE – IDC CORE BANKING SYSTEM EXPERT  
PROCUREMENT REFERENCE: AFC 200/2025  
  
We thank you for the opportunity to submit our proposal for the above\-referenced tender for the provision of an International Consultant\.  
  
Rubiem Innovations is a leading Business and Artificial Intelligence consultancy firm with an established footprint across the SADC region\. We possess extensive experience in organisational transformation, restructuring, and digital modernisation\. Our firm has previously delivered consultancy services to prominent financial institutions in Zimbabwe, including the Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe, ZB Financial Holdings, the People’s Own Savings Bank \(POSB\), and the Zimbabwe Stock Exchange \(ZSE\)\.  
  
For this assignment, Rubiem Innovations will deploy a team of four senior consultants with proven expertise in organisational and digital transformation, financial analysis, business process reengineering, and human resources consultancy\.  
  
Our proposal is further strengthened through strategic partnerships with reputable international organisations, including the League of Companies \(LOC\) and the Artificial Intelligence Institute Africa \(AIIA\)\. These partnerships provide us with access to world\-class consultants, methodologies, and tools that ensure the successful delivery of this engagement\.  
  
We trust that our submission meets your requirements and look forward to a favourable consideration of our proposal\.  
  
Yours faithfully, ANDREW MUGARI Chief Consultant Rubiem Innovations …………………………
